Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: jewelry worn on the head [300209301], jewelry by location [300211901], jewelry [300209286], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Decorative items worn in, on, or about the ear.
Pieza decorativa que se lleva en o sobre la oreja.
Sieraden die in, op of rond het oor worden gedragen.
Dekoratives Objekt, das in, auf oder am Ohr getragen wird.
戴於耳朵裡面、上面或周圍的裝飾用物件。
